evaluations.completion_preview:
The Jones polynomial for the standard treewidth knot (3_1) is given by:

\[ V_{3_1}(t) = -t^{1/2} - t^{-1/2} \]

The degree of the Jones polynomial is the highest power of \( t \) in the polynomial.
